description: Evaluate an agent's ability to handle a complex billing dispute involving data overages and multi-agent coordination.

nodes.task_description: The agent should look up the customer's recent data usage and identify the $40 overage charge.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the $40 overage in the conversation.

nodes.task_description: Check the customer's loyalty status and determine if they are eligible for a one-time waiver.

expected_outcome.value: Agent informs the customer they are eligible for a waiver.

nodes.task_description: Apply the $40 credit to the customer's account.

expected_outcome.value: The account balance is reduced by $40.
